subject: fix(builder): resolve TS2532 in PageTabs condition indicator
body:
Optional chaining on `page.conditions[0]?.conditions.length` returns
`undefined` which fails TypeScript's strict `> 0` comparison. Added
nullish coalescing fallback `?? 0` to satisfy the type checker.
